list.name: pair
list.label: Pair
list.definition: SELECT id as __value, canonical as __text FROM pairs WHERE is_enabled = true ORDER BY canonical

panels.title: Opportunities per Hour
panels.description: Hourly count of detected opportunities. Identify periods with high vs no activity.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', detected_at) as time, COUNT(*) as count FROM opportunities WHERE detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR pair_id = ${pair}) AND strategy = 'dislocation' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Opportunities by Hour of Day
panels.description: Distribution of opportunities by hour (UTC). Shows which hours typically have most activity.

targets.rawSql: SELECT LPAD(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM detected_at)::text, 2, '0') as hour, COUNT(*) as count FROM opportunities WHERE detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR pair_id = ${pair}) AND strategy = 'dislocation' GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM detected_at) ORDER BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM detected_at)

panels.title: Spread Distribution Over Time (CEX vs DEX)
panels.description: Calculated spread from quote_rollups showing what spreads existed over time, even when no opportunities triggered.

targets.rawSql: WITH cex_quotes AS (SELECT r.interval_start, r.pair_id, r.close_mid as cex_mid FROM quote_rollups r JOIN venues v ON v.id = r.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'cex' AND v.is_anchor = true AND r.interval_type = '1m' AND r.interval_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR r.pair_id = ${pair})), dex_quotes AS (SELECT r.interval_start, r.pair_id, r.close_mid as dex_mid FROM quote_rollups r JOIN venues v ON v.id = r.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'dex' AND r.interval_type = '1m' AND r.interval_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR r.pair_id = ${pair})) SELECT c.interval_start as time, CASE WHEN c.cex_mid > 0 THEN ABS((d.dex_mid - c.cex_mid) / c.cex_mid * 10000) ELSE 0 END as "Spread (bps)" FROM cex_quotes c JOIN dex_quotes d ON c.interval_start = d.interval_start AND c.pair_id = d.pair_id ORDER BY time

panels.title: Spread Histogram (24h)
panels.description: Distribution of observed spreads bucketed into ranges. Shows what spread levels are most common.

targets.rawSql: WITH cex_quotes AS (SELECT r.interval_start, r.pair_id, r.close_mid as cex_mid FROM quote_rollups r JOIN venues v ON v.id = r.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'cex' AND v.is_anchor = true AND r.interval_type = '1m' AND r.interval_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR r.pair_id = ${pair})), dex_quotes AS (SELECT r.interval_start, r.pair_id, r.close_mid as dex_mid FROM quote_rollups r JOIN venues v ON v.id = r.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'dex' AND r.interval_type = '1m' AND r.interval_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR r.pair_id = ${pair})), spreads AS (SELECT CASE WHEN c.cex_mid > 0 THEN ABS((d.dex_mid - c.cex_mid) / c.cex_mid * 10000) ELSE 0 END as spread_bps FROM cex_quotes c JOIN dex_quotes d ON c.interval_start = d.interval_start AND c.pair_id = d.pair_id) SELECT CASE WHEN spread_bps < 5 THEN '0-5' WHEN spread_bps < 10 THEN '5-10' WHEN spread_bps < 15 THEN '10-15' WHEN spread_bps < 20 THEN '15-20' ELSE '20+' END as bucket, COUNT(*) as count FROM spreads GROUP BY CASE WHEN spread_bps < 5 THEN '0-5' WHEN spread_bps < 10 THEN '5-10' WHEN spread_bps < 15 THEN '10-15' WHEN spread_bps < 20 THEN '15-20' ELSE '20+' END ORDER BY CASE WHEN bucket = '0-5' THEN 1 WHEN bucket = '5-10' THEN 2 WHEN bucket = '10-15' THEN 3 WHEN bucket = '15-20' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

panels.title: Current Filter Thresholds
panels.description: Shows configured MIN_SPREAD_BPS thresholds per pair. Helps understand why opportunities may not trigger.

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.canonical as pair, pvc.chain, COALESCE(pvc.min_spread_bps, 15.0) as min_spread_bps, COALESCE(pvc.min_duration_ms, 2000) as min_duration_ms, COALESCE(pvc.min_liquidity_usd, 50000) as min_liquidity_usd FROM pairs p LEFT JOIN pair_venue_config pvc ON pvc.pair_id = p.id WHERE p.is_enabled = true AND (${pair} = 0 OR p.id = ${pair}) GROUP BY p.canonical, pvc.chain, pvc.min_spread_bps, pvc.min_duration_ms, pvc.min_liquidity_usd ORDER BY p.canonical

panels.title: Near-Miss Spreads (Close to Threshold)
panels.description: Spreads that were 50-100% of the threshold - close but did not trigger. If many near-misses, consider lowering threshold.

targets.rawSql: WITH thresholds AS (SELECT p.id as pair_id, COALESCE(MIN(pvc.min_spread_bps), 15.0) as threshold FROM pairs p LEFT JOIN pair_venue_config pvc ON pvc.pair_id = p.id WHERE p.is_enabled = true GROUP BY p.id), cex_quotes AS (SELECT r.interval_start, r.pair_id, r.close_mid as cex_mid FROM quote_rollups r JOIN venues v ON v.id = r.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'cex' AND v.is_anchor = true AND r.interval_type = '1m' AND r.interval_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR r.pair_id = ${pair})), dex_quotes AS (SELECT r.interval_start, r.pair_id, r.close_mid as dex_mid FROM quote_rollups r JOIN venues v ON v.id = r.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'dex' AND r.interval_type = '1m' AND r.interval_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR r.pair_id = ${pair})), spreads AS (SELECT c.interval_start, c.pair_id, CASE WHEN c.cex_mid > 0 THEN ABS((d.dex_mid - c.cex_mid) / c.cex_mid * 10000) ELSE 0 END as spread_bps FROM cex_quotes c JOIN dex_quotes d ON c.interval_start = d.interval_start AND c.pair_id = d.pair_id) SELECT s.interval_start as time, s.spread_bps as "Spread (bps)", t.threshold as "Threshold" FROM spreads s JOIN thresholds t ON t.pair_id = s.pair_id WHERE s.spread_bps >= t.threshold * 0.5 AND s.spread_bps < t.threshold ORDER BY time

panels.title: Quote Volume by Venue
panels.description: Count of quotes per venue over time. Gaps indicate data feed issues.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', qr.ts) as time, v.name as venue, COUNT(*) as count FROM quotes_raw qr JOIN venues v ON v.id = qr.venue_id WHERE qr.ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR qr.pair_id = ${pair}) GROUP BY date_trunc('minute', qr.ts), v.name ORDER BY time

panels.title: Quote Staleness Events (Gaps > 5s)
panels.description: Periods where quotes were stale (gap > 5 seconds between quotes). Helps identify data feed issues.

targets.rawSql: WITH quote_gaps AS (SELECT v.name as venue, qr.ts, LAG(qr.ts) OVER (PARTITION BY qr.venue_id ORDER BY qr.ts) as prev_ts, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (qr.ts - LAG(qr.ts) OVER (PARTITION BY qr.venue_id ORDER BY qr.ts))) as gap_seconds FROM quotes_raw qr JOIN venues v ON v.id = qr.venue_id WHERE qr.ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR qr.pair_id = ${pair})) SELECT ts as time, venue, gap_seconds as "Gap (s)" FROM quote_gaps WHERE gap_seconds > 5 ORDER BY ts

panels.title: CEX vs DEX Mid Prices
panels.description: Overlay of CEX (Binance) and DEX (Uniswap) mid prices. Visually see convergence/divergence patterns.

targets.rawSql: SELECT r.interval_start as time, r.close_mid as value, v.name as metric FROM quote_rollups r JOIN venues v ON v.id = r.venue_id WHERE r.interval_type = '1m' AND r.interval_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR r.pair_id = ${pair}) AND v.name IN ('binance', 'uniswap_v3') ORDER BY time

panels.title: Hourly Summary
panels.description: Per-hour breakdown: avg spread, max spread, opportunity count, quote count, and data gaps.

targets.rawSql: WITH hourly_quotes AS (SELECT date_trunc('hour', qr.received_at) as hour, COUNT(*) as quote_count, COUNT(DISTINCT qr.venue_id) as active_venues FROM quotes_raw qr WHERE qr.received_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR qr.pair_id = ${pair}) GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', qr.received_at)), hourly_spreads AS (SELECT date_trunc('hour', c.interval_start) as hour, AVG(CASE WHEN c.cex_mid > 0 THEN ABS((d.dex_mid - c.cex_mid) / c.cex_mid * 10000) ELSE 0 END) as avg_spread_bps, MAX(CASE WHEN c.cex_mid > 0 THEN ABS((d.dex_mid - c.cex_mid) / c.cex_mid * 10000) ELSE 0 END) as max_spread_bps FROM (SELECT r.interval_start, r.pair_id, r.close_mid as cex_mid FROM quote_rollups r JOIN venues v ON v.id = r.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'cex' AND v.is_anchor = true AND r.interval_type = '1m' AND r.interval_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR r.pair_id = ${pair})) c JOIN (SELECT r.interval_start, r.pair_id, r.close_mid as dex_mid FROM quote_rollups r JOIN venues v ON v.id = r.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'dex' AND r.interval_type = '1m' AND r.interval_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR r.pair_id = ${pair})) d ON c.interval_start = d.interval_start AND c.pair_id = d.pair_id GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', c.interval_start)), hourly_opps AS (SELECT date_trunc('hour', o.detected_at) as hour, COUNT(*) as opp_count FROM opportunities o WHERE o.detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR o.pair_id = ${pair}) AND o.strategy = 'dislocation' GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', o.detected_at)), hourly_gaps AS (SELECT date_trunc('hour', gap_time) as hour, COUNT(*) as gap_count FROM (SELECT qr.received_at as gap_time, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (qr.received_at - LAG(qr.received_at) OVER (PARTITION BY qr.venue_id ORDER BY qr.received_at))) as gap FROM quotes_raw qr WHERE qr.received_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR qr.pair_id = ${pair})) gaps WHERE gap > 5 GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', gap_time)) SELECT hs.hour as time, ROUND(hs.avg_spread_bps::numeric, 2) as avg_spread_bps, ROUND(hs.max_spread_bps::numeric, 2) as max_spread_bps, COALESCE(ho.opp_count, 0) as opportunities, COALESCE(hq.quote_count, 0) as quote_count, COALESCE(hq.active_venues, 0) as active_venues, COALESCE(hg.gap_count, 0) as data_gaps FROM hourly_spreads hs LEFT JOIN hourly_opps ho ON ho.hour = hs.hour LEFT JOIN hourly_quotes hq ON hq.hour = hs.hour LEFT JOIN hourly_gaps hg ON hg.hour = hs.hour ORDER BY hs.hour DESC
